channel.title: Menopause Mood & Brain Fog — Hush
channel.description: Menopause Mood & Brain Fog — hormone-free menopause self-care pins from Hush.

item.title: I Thought the Brain Fog Meant Something Was Wrong With Me
item.description: Menopause brain fog made me think something was wrong with me. Turns out it's a common midlife and perimenopause thing, and you're not the only one. Hormone-free self care. #menopausebrainfog #perimenopause #midlifewomen #hormonefree
